headline: Assessing Fox (FOXA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Why Fox stock is on investors’ radar today Fox (FOXA) shares have moved sharply in recent weeks, with a 2% gain over the past day and 8% over the past week contrasting with a 19% decline over the past month. Those short term swings are drawing attention to the company’s longer track record. Over the past year Fox shows a 5% total return and multi year returns are much higher, alongside reported revenue of US$16.6b and net income of US$1.9b. See our latest analysis for Fox. Recent trading...

headline: CNBC Sport: Paramount may unwind WBD's sports strategy if merger goes through
summary: WBD's sports strategy it has deployed since it lost NBA rights may not make sense if it's acquired by Paramount.
